name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-64x8dtof
author: Vonweller
description: DFRobot 64x8 dTOF 是 64*8 直接飞行时间激光测距矩阵传感器，可通过高速 UART 获取全帧、单行、单点或一段点的 X/Y/Z 坐标与强度数据。
description_zh_cn: DFRobot 64x8 dTOF 是 64*8 直接飞行时间激光测距矩阵传感器，可通过高速 UART 获取全帧、单行、单点或一段点的 X/Y/Z 坐标与强度数据。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot 64x8 dTOF laser ranging matrix sensor, supporting high-speed UART initialization, frame configuration, full-frame, single-line, single-point, and multi-point X/Y/Z/intensity readings.
description_zh_hk: DFRobot 64x8 dTOF 是 64*8 直接飛行時間雷射測距矩陣感測器，可透過高速 UART 取得全幀、單行、單點或一段點的 X/Y/Z 座標與強度資料。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot 64x8 dTOF laser ranging matrix sensor, supporting high-speed UART initialization, frame configuration, full-frame, single-line, single-point, and multi-point X/Y/Z/intensity readings.
description_ko: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot 64x8 dTOF laser ranging matrix sensor, supporting high-speed UART initialization, frame configuration, full-frame, single-line, single-point, and multi-point X/Y/Z/intensity readings.
